chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2499 of 2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.2325/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.845/2025 (Return of surety) ------------------------------ 14.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Meo, advocate for applicant/ surety Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G. ------------------------------------------------- Along with urgent application, application for return of surety is moved by the applicant/surety. It appears that interim pre-arrest bail was granted to applicant Muhammad Ashraf son of Phool Khan by this Court vide order dated 26.12.2022, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court, with further direction to join the investigation or appear before the concerned trial Court as the case may be and place such proof on the next date. As per endorsement of Nazir, one Muhammad Rehman son of Muhammad Ramzan furnished surety for the applicant/ accused by way of depositing defence saving certificates in the sum of Rs.100,000/-. Interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 04.07.2023. Counsel for applicant/surety submits that the applicant/accused has been acquitted by the learned Court vide order dated 13.11.2024. Certified copy of the said order is placed on record.

Counsel for applicant/surety submits that the applicant/accused has been acquitted by the learned Court vide order dated 13.11.2024. Certified copy of the said order is placed on record. Learned D.P.G. present in Court in some other cases waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid order of the trial Court dated 13.11.2024, has recorded no objection for return of surety. In the view of above, surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
